name: Poppy Seed-Lemon Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Place all ingredients (except liquids and yeast) inside the bread pan.
3. Add liquid ingredients, including water and lemon zest.
4. Close the cover and place the yeast into the yeast holder.
5. Press start for a quick bake.
